test_cases.test_case: Successful login with valid credentials
preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Dashboard.

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with invalid username
preconditions: User is on the login page.
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error message is displayed, password field is cleared, and username is retained.

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with invalid password
preconditions: User is on the login page.
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error message is displayed, password field is cleared, and username is retained.

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with empty fields
preconditions: User is on the login page.
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error message is displayed for both fields, and both fields remain empty.

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with maximum length username and password
preconditions: User is on the login page.
steps: 1. Enter a username with maximum allowed length.
2. Enter a password with maximum allowed length.
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Dashboard if credentials are valid.

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with special characters in username and password
preconditions: User is on the login page.
steps: 1. Enter a username with special characters.
2. Enter a password with special characters.
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Dashboard if credentials are valid.

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with whitespace in username and password
preconditions: User is on the login page.
steps: 1. Enter a username with leading and trailing whitespace.
2. Enter a password with leading and trailing whitespace.
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Dashboard if credentials are valid after trimming whitespace.

test_cases.test_case: Display personalized greeting
test_cases.expected_result: The personalized greeting is displayed at the top of the Dashboard.

test_cases.test_case: View upcoming teaching actions in Timeline block
steps: 2. Select a time range from the dropdown.
test_cases.expected_result: The Timeline block displays upcoming teaching actions for the selected time range.

test_cases.test_case: No items in selected time range
steps: 2. Select a time range with no upcoming actions.
test_cases.expected_result: An empty state message is shown in the Timeline block.

test_cases.test_case: Search for non-existent activity
steps: 2. Enter a non-existent activity name in the search field.
test_cases.expected_result: No results found message is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Select maximum time range
steps: 2. Select the maximum time range from the dropdown.
test_cases.expected_result: The Timeline block displays all upcoming teaching actions within the maximum time range.

test_cases.test_case: Navigate to previous month in Calendar block
steps: 2. Click the left arrow to go to the previous month.
test_cases.expected_result: The Calendar block updates to show the previous month with the correct events highlighted.

test_cases.test_case: Create a new calendar event
test_cases.expected_result: The new event is created and displayed in the Calendar block.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to create a calendar event with missing details
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that required fields must be filled.

test_cases.test_case: Filter events by course with no events
steps: 2. Select a course from the 'All courses' dropdown that has no events.
test_cases.expected_result: The Calendar block shows no events for the selected course.

test_cases.test_case: Toggle Edit Mode and Add a Block
steps: 2. Click on '+ Add a block' button.
3. Select 'Comments' from the list of available block types.
test_cases.expected_result: The 'Comments' block is added to the Dashboard.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to Add a Block in View Mode
steps: 1. Click on '+ Add a block' button.
test_cases.expected_result: The '+ Add a block' button is not visible or clickable.

test_cases.test_case: Cancel Adding a Block
steps: 1. Click on '+ Add a block' button.
test_cases.expected_result: User is returned to the Dashboard without adding a block.

test_cases.test_case: Reset Page to Default
preconditions: User has added multiple blocks in Edit mode
steps: 1. Click on 'Reset page to default' button.
test_cases.expected_result: All blocks are removed and the Dashboard is reset to its default state.

test_cases.test_case: Add Maximum Number of Blocks
steps: 1. Click on '+ Add a block' button.
2. Add blocks until the maximum limit is reached.
test_cases.expected_result: User is able to add blocks up to the maximum limit without errors.

test_cases.test_case: Check Move Icon and Options Menu
preconditions: At least one block is present
steps: 2. Check for the presence of the move icon and three-dot options menu.
test_cases.expected_result: The move icon and options menu are visible for the block.

test_cases.test_case: View all courses
preconditions: User is logged in as a teacher
steps: 1. Navigate to the My Courses page.
test_cases.expected_result: All courses the teacher has access to are displayed as visual cards with course banner images, names, and categories.

test_cases.test_case: Search for a specific course
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
steps: 1. Enter a valid course name in the search field.
test_cases.expected_result: The course matching the search term is displayed in the course cards.

test_cases.test_case: Search with an invalid course name
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
steps: 1. Enter an invalid course name in the search field.
test_cases.expected_result: No courses are displayed, and a message indicating no results found is shown.

test_cases.test_case: Remove a course from view
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
At least one course is visible
steps: 1. Click the three-dot menu on a course card.
test_cases.expected_result: The selected course is hidden from the view but remains enrolled.

test_cases.test_case: Star a course
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
At least one course is visible
steps: 1. Click the three-dot menu on a course card.
test_cases.expected_result: The selected course is pinned to the top of the course list.

test_cases.test_case: Change layout to List
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
test_cases.expected_result: The course cards are displayed in a list format.

test_cases.test_case: Change layout to Summary
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
test_cases.expected_result: The course cards are displayed in a summary format.

test_cases.test_case: Select status filter
preconditions: User is on the My Courses page
At least one course exists in each status category
test_cases.expected_result: Only courses that are currently in progress are displayed.

test_cases.test_case: View course content with all sections expanded
preconditions: User has access to the course
test_cases.expected_result: All sections are expanded, displaying all activities and resources.

test_cases.test_case: Collapse all sections
preconditions: User has access to the course
At least one section is expanded
test_cases.expected_result: All sections are collapsed.

test_cases.test_case: Access course page without permission
preconditions: User is logged out or does not have access
steps: 1. Attempt to navigate to the Course page.
test_cases.expected_result: User is shown an error message indicating lack of access.

test_cases.test_case: View course page with maximum number of sections
preconditions: User has access to the course with maximum sections
test_cases.expected_result: All sections are displayed correctly without performance issues.

test_cases.test_case: View course page with empty sections
preconditions: User has access to the course with empty sections
test_cases.expected_result: Sections are displayed with appropriate messages indicating no content available.

modules.module: Course Edit Mode and Activity Chooser

test_cases.test_case: Enable Edit Mode
preconditions: User has permission to edit the course
steps: 2. Click on the 'Enable Edit Mode' button.
test_cases.expected_result: The Course page transforms into an authoring interface with inline controls visible.

test_cases.test_case: Add an Activity
preconditions: User is on the Course page
steps: 1. Click on '+ Add an activity or resource' button.
2. Select 'Assignment' from the Activity Chooser modal.
test_cases.expected_result: The Assignment creation form opens.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to Add Activity without Edit Mode
preconditions: User is on the Course page
steps: 1. Click on '+ Add an activity or resource' button.
test_cases.expected_result: The system shows an error message indicating that Edit Mode must be enabled to add activities.

test_cases.test_case: Add Activity with Empty Search
preconditions: User is on the Activity Chooser modal
test_cases.expected_result: The system displays all available activities/resources in the grid.

test_cases.test_case: Add Activity with Maximum Length Name
preconditions: User is on the Course page
steps: 1. Click on '+ Add an activity or resource' button.
2. Select 'Page' from the Activity Chooser modal.
3. Enter a name with maximum allowed characters in the name field.
test_cases.expected_result: The Page creation form opens with the name correctly displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Add Activity with Special Characters
preconditions: User is on the Course page
steps: 1. Click on '+ Add an activity or resource' button.
2. Select 'Forum' from the Activity Chooser modal.
3. Enter a name with special characters (e.g., @#$%^&*) in the name field.
test_cases.expected_result: The Forum creation form opens with the name correctly displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Create assignment with all valid fields
preconditions: User has selected 'Assignment' from the Activity Chooser
steps: 2. Fill in the description using the rich text editor.
4. Set the availability dates and enable them.
5. Select submission types and configure settings.
6. Set feedback types and submission settings.
test_cases.expected_result: The assignment is created successfully and the user is redirected to the course page.

test_cases.test_case: Create assignment without assignment name
preconditions: User has selected 'Assignment' from the Activity Chooser
steps: 1. Leave the assignment name field empty.
2. Fill in the description using the rich text editor.
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the assignment name is required.

test_cases.test_case: Create assignment with invalid file type
preconditions: User has selected 'Assignment' from the Activity Chooser
steps: 2. Upload a file with an unsupported file type.
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the file type is not accepted.

test_cases.test_case: Create assignment with maximum length assignment name
preconditions: User has selected 'Assignment' from the Activity Chooser
steps: 1. Enter an assignment name that is at the maximum allowed character length.
2. Fill in the description using the rich text editor.
test_cases.expected_result: The assignment is created successfully and the user is redirected to the course page.

test_cases.test_case: Create assignment with no description and no additional files
preconditions: User has selected 'Assignment' from the Activity Chooser
steps: 3. Do not upload any additional files.
test_cases.expected_result: The assignment is created successfully with the assignment name only, and the user is redirected to the course page.

test_cases.test_case: Successfully save course settings with valid inputs
preconditions: User has access to Course Settings
steps: 2. Fill in the Course full name with 'Introduction to Testing'.
3. Fill in the Course short name with 'IT101'.
4. Select a Course category from the dropdown.
8. Fill in the Course ID number with 'IT101-001'.
test_cases.expected_result: The course settings are saved successfully, and the user is redirected to the course page.

test_cases.test_case: Fail to save course settings with missing required fields
preconditions: User has access to Course Settings
steps: 2. Leave the Course full name field empty.
3. Leave the Course short name field empty.
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the Course full name and Course short name are required.

test_cases.test_case: Test maximum length for Course full name
preconditions: User has access to Course Settings
steps: 2. Fill in the Course full name with a string of 255 characters.
3. Fill in the Course short name with 'IT101'.
4. Select a Course category from the dropdown.
test_cases.expected_result: The course settings are saved successfully, and the user is redirected to the course page.

test_cases.test_case: Fail to save course settings with invalid date range
preconditions: User has access to Course Settings
steps: 2. Enter a Course start date that is after the Course end date.
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the Course start date must be before the Course end date.

test_cases.test_case: Test empty fields for optional inputs
preconditions: User has access to Course Settings
steps: 2. Fill in the Course full name with 'Introduction to Testing'.
3. Fill in the Course short name with 'IT101'.
4. Select a Course category from the dropdown.
test_cases.expected_result: The course settings are saved successfully, and the user is redirected to the course page, with optional fields left empty.

test_cases.test_case: Filter participants by enrollment context
preconditions: User is on the Participants page
steps: 1. Select an enrollment context from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: The participants list updates to show only users enrolled in the selected context

test_cases.test_case: Enroll a user successfully
preconditions: User is on the Participants page
steps: 1. Enter a valid user in the search field
2. Select a role from the Role dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: The user is added to the course with the specified role

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to enroll a user without selecting a role
preconditions: User is on the Enrol users dialog
steps: 1. Enter a valid user in the search field
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that a role must be selected

test_cases.test_case: Filter participants with no conditions
preconditions: User is on the Participants page
steps: 1. Click 'Apply filters' without adding any conditions
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that at least one condition must be added

test_cases.test_case: Filter participants with maximum length name
preconditions: User is on the Participants page
steps: 1. Enter a name with maximum allowed characters in the filter
test_cases.expected_result: The participants list updates correctly to show users matching the maximum length name

test_cases.test_case: Bulk action with no users selected
preconditions: User is on the Participants page
steps: 1. Click on the 'With selected users...' dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that no users are selected for the action

test_cases.test_case: Search for a user with special characters
preconditions: User is on the Enrol users dialog
steps: 1. Enter a user name with special characters in the search field
test_cases.expected_result: The search results display users matching the special character input

test_cases.test_case: View assignment metadata
preconditions: User is logged in as a teacher
test_cases.expected_result: The assignment's Opened date, Due date, Description, and attached files are displayed correctly.

test_cases.test_case: Open grading interface
preconditions: User is logged in as a teacher
test_cases.expected_result: The grading interface for individual students opens successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to view assignment without being logged in
steps: 1. Attempt to navigate to the Assignment page.
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page with an appropriate error message.

test_cases.test_case: Check grading interface without submissions
preconditions: User is logged in as a teacher
An assignment exists with no submissions
test_cases.expected_result: The grading interface opens, but indicates that there are no submissions to grade.

test_cases.test_case: View assignment with maximum length description
preconditions: User is logged in as a teacher
An assignment exists with a maximum length description
test_cases.expected_result: The assignment's metadata, including the maximum length description, is displayed correctly without truncation.

test_cases.test_case: View assignment with no attached files
preconditions: User is logged in as a teacher
An assignment exists with no attached files
test_cases.expected_result: The assignment's metadata is displayed correctly, indicating that there are no attached files.

test_cases.test_case: Check grading summary panel with zero submissions
preconditions: User is logged in as a teacher
An assignment exists with zero submissions
test_cases.expected_result: The grading summary panel shows 'Number of submissions: 0' and other metrics are displayed correctly.

test_cases.test_case: Search by student name
preconditions: There are submissions in the system
steps: 2. Enter a valid student name in the search field
test_cases.expected_result: The table displays only the submissions for the specified student

test_cases.test_case: Search with invalid student name
steps: 2. Enter an invalid student name in the search field
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating no submissions found

test_cases.test_case: Search with empty student name
test_cases.expected_result: The table displays all submissions without any filtering

test_cases.test_case: Filter by submission status
preconditions: There are submissions with various statuses
steps: 2. Select a submission status from the filter dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: The table displays only the submissions with the selected status

test_cases.test_case: Filter with no selection
steps: 2. Do not select any submission status
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that a selection is required

test_cases.test_case: Filter with maximum length of submission status
steps: 2. Enter a submission status with maximum allowed characters
test_cases.expected_result: The table displays submissions matching the maximum length status

test_cases.test_case: Enable Quick grading mode
steps: 2. Click on the 'Enable Quick grading' toggle
test_cases.expected_result: The table allows inline grade entry for each submission

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to grade without permissions
preconditions: User does not have grading permissions
steps: 2. Try to enable Quick grading mode
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating insufficient permissions

test_cases.test_case: Inline grading with maximum grade value
steps: 2. Enter the maximum grade value in the inline grading field
test_cases.expected_result: The grade is saved successfully and displayed correctly in the table

test_cases.test_case: Switch to User report
preconditions: User is on the Grader report page
steps: 1. Click on the report-type selector dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: The page refreshes to display the User report view.

test_cases.test_case: Edit a grade entry
steps: 1. Locate a grade cell for a student
2. Click on the cell and enter a new valid grade
test_cases.expected_result: The new grade is saved and displayed in the grade cell.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to save an invalid grade
steps: 1. Locate a grade cell for a student
2. Click on the cell and enter an invalid grade (e.g., below minimum range)
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating the grade is out of range and the grade is not saved.

test_cases.test_case: Leave grade cell empty and save
steps: 1. Locate a grade cell for a student
2. Click on the cell and delete the existing grade
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the grade cannot be empty and the grade is not saved.

test_cases.test_case: Enter maximum length grade
steps: 1. Locate a grade cell for a student
2. Click on the cell and enter a grade at the maximum allowed length
test_cases.expected_result: The grade is saved successfully and displayed in the grade cell.

test_cases.test_case: Filter by student name with no results
preconditions: User is on the Grader report page
steps: 1. Enter a non-existent student name in the user search field
test_cases.expected_result: The grade table displays no results found message.

test_cases.test_case: Switch to Overview report and back
preconditions: User is on the Grader report page
steps: 1. Click on the report-type selector dropdown
3. Click on the report-type selector dropdown again
test_cases.expected_result: The page refreshes to display the Grader report view again.

test_cases.test_case: View Profile with Complete Information
test_cases.expected_result: The profile displays the teacher's initials icon, full name, message button, and complete profile description.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to View Profile When Not Logged In
test_cases.expected_result: The system redirects to the login page with an error message indicating that login is required.

test_cases.test_case: View Profile with No Profile Description
test_cases.expected_result: The profile displays the teacher's initials icon, full name, and a message button, but the profile description section is empty.

test_cases.test_case: Access All Information Cards
test_cases.expected_result: Each information card (User details, Privacy and policies, Course details, Miscellaneous, Reports, Login activity) is accessible and displays the correct information.

test_cases.test_case: Edit Profile with Invalid Email Format
preconditions: User is on the Profile page
steps: 2. Enter an invalid email format in the email field.
test_cases.expected_result: The system shows an error message indicating that the email format is invalid.

test_cases.test_case: View Profile with Maximum Length Description
preconditions: User has a profile description at maximum length
test_cases.expected_result: The profile displays the teacher's initials icon, full name, message button, and the profile description is fully visible without truncation.

test_cases.test_case: View Profile with No Login Activity
preconditions: User has never accessed the site
test_cases.expected_result: The Login activity section shows 'No login activity recorded.'

test_cases.test_case: Successfully update profile with valid data
preconditions: User is on the Edit Profile page
steps: 5. Fill in MoodleNet profile ID with '123456'
9. Enter Description in the rich text editor
11. Fill in Picture description with 'Profile picture'
test_cases.expected_result: Profile is updated successfully and the profile page is refreshed with the new data.

test_cases.test_case: Fail to update profile with missing required fields
preconditions: User is on the Edit Profile page
test_cases.expected_result: Error messages are displayed for First name, Last name, and Email address indicating they are required.

test_cases.test_case: Fail to update profile with invalid email format
preconditions: User is on the Edit Profile page
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating the email format is invalid.

test_cases.test_case: Update profile with maximum length fields
preconditions: User is on the Edit Profile page
steps: 1. Fill in First name with a string of 255 characters
2. Fill in Last name with a string of 255 characters
3. Fill in Email address with a valid email of 255 characters
4. Fill in Description with a string of 2000 characters
test_cases.expected_result: Profile is updated successfully without any errors despite maximum length inputs.

test_cases.test_case: Upload a large image file
preconditions: User is on the Edit Profile page
steps: 1. Click on the upload area for user picture
2. Select an image file larger than the allowed limit
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating the file size exceeds the limit.

test_cases.test_case: Cancel profile edit without saving changes
preconditions: User is on the Edit Profile page
steps: 1. Make changes to the profile fields
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the profile page without any changes being saved.

test_cases.test_case: Successful logout
preconditions: User is logged into the application.
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page.

test_cases.test_case: Logout without being logged in
preconditions: User is not logged into the application.
steps: 1. Attempt to click on the 'Log out' button.
test_cases.expected_result: Logout button is disabled or not visible.

test_cases.test_case: Session timeout before logout
preconditions: User is logged into the application.
User's session is set to timeout.
steps: 1. Wait for the session to timeout.
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page with a session timeout message.
